choices.text: Hohmann transfer: 2 burns connecting transfer ellipse. Burn 1 at orbit 1 enters elliptical path; coast to opposite side; burn 2 circularizes at orbit 2. Most efficient between coplanar circular orbits. LEO→GEO ~3.9 km/s.

Gravity assists (Voyager: Jupiter +10 km/s, Parker Solar Probe: 7 Venus flybys) use planet gravity for free delta-v. Aerobraking uses planet atmosphere instead of retro burn (Mars Reconnaissance Orbiter). Both major savings.
